_comment: Scoop manifest for ibounce — local AWS API-call gating proxy.
_status: SCAFFOLD: ibounce is a Python package; Windows support via pip is v1.1 work. The goreleaser windows .zip produced by the iam-roles Python build pipeline will replace this scaffold when ready. Per [[vendor-integration-claim-qualifier]]: NOT published to a public Scoop registry yet.
description: Local AWS API-call gating proxy (Bounce suite, part of iam-jit) — Windows via pip install; native .exe coming in v1.1
notes:
ibounce on Windows requires Python 3.10+. Until a native .exe is built, install via pip:
  pip install iam-jit
  ibounce --version
A native Windows .exe via PyInstaller/Nuitka is planned for v1.1 (#746).
